ExpSyntax.val: '<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="contact"> <attribute name="parentcustomerid" /> <attribute name="firstname" /> <attribute name="lastname" /> <attribute name="jobtitle" /> <attribute name="telephone1" /> <attribute name="contactid" /> <attribute name="pa_contactnumber" /> <attribute name="address1_name" /> <attribute name="address1_fax" /> <attribute name="address1_line1" /> <attribute name="address1_line2" /> <attribute name="address1_line3" /> <attribute name="address1_city" /> <attribute name="address1_postalcode" /> <attribute name="address1_stateorprovince" /> <attribute name="emailaddress1" /> <order attribute="fullname" descending="false" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /> <condition attribute="parentcustomerid" operator="eq" value="'&Trim({2,2})&'" /> </filter> <link-entity name="pa_rostermember" from="pa_customerid" to="contactid" link-type="inner" alias="rm"> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /> <condition attribute="pa_rostercode" operator="in"> <value>TE</value> <value>PRIMARY</value> <value>DUEBIL</value> </condition> </filter> <attribute name="pa_rostercode" /> </link-entity> </entity> </fetch>'

Text.val: we have see DUEBIL and duebil; and the link write choked on duplicate error

ExpSyntax.val: '<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="true"> <entity name="contact"> <attribute name="parentcustomerid" /> <attribute name="firstname" /> <attribute name="lastname" /> <attribute name="jobtitle" /> <attribute name="telephone1" /> <attribute name="contactid" /> <attribute name="pa_contactnumber" /> <attribute name="address1_name" /> <attribute name="address1_fax" /> <attribute name="address1_line1" /> <attribute name="address1_line2" /> <attribute name="address1_line3" /> <attribute name="address1_city" /> <attribute name="address1_postalcode" /> <attribute name="address1_stateorprovince" /> <attribute name="emailaddress1" /> <order attribute="fullname" descending="false" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /> <condition attribute="parentcustomerid" operator="eq" value="'&Trim({2,2})&'" /> </filter> <link-entity name="listmember" from="entityid" to="contactid" visible="false" intersect="true"> <link-entity name="list" from="listid" to="listid" alias="lm"> <filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /> <condition attribute="listname" operator="in"><value>Interest - Elected PP</value><value>Interest - Elected HR</value><value>STATIC-HR title MBR</value><value>Interest - Elected Finance</value><value>STATIC-FINANCE title MBR</value><value>Interest - Elected Safety</value><value>STATIC-SAFETY title MBR</value><value>STATIC-PP title MBR</value><value>Interest - Elected Marketing</value><value>Interest - Elected Enviro</value><value>Interest - Elected Tax</value><value>Interest - Elected Energy</value><value>Interest - Elected WC</value></condition> </filter> <attribute name="listname" /> </link-entity> </link-entity> </entity> </fetch>'
